Custom Lab Settings.help_text: Specify a custom name for your lab environment

Custom Lab Settings.help_text: Enable custom monitoring and alerting for the lab

Advanced Network Settings.help_text: Enable Network Address Translation for internet access

Lab Environment Deployment.help_text: Choose where to deploy the lab environment

Lab Environment Deployment.help_text: Cloud region for deployment (when using cloud target)

Lab Environment Deployment.help_text: Enable automatic scaling based on resource usage
